'''bawugu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cnemid|cnemid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-w-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cnemid|cnemid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| bawugu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæwigith|bæwigith]] || [[word:bæwigij|bæwigij]] || [[word:bæwigish|bæwigish]] || [[word:bæwigi|bæwigi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bawuwuguth|bawuwuguth]] || [[word:bawuwuguj|bawuwuguj]] || [[word:bawuwugush|bawuwugush]] || [[word:bawuwugu|bawuwugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bawuguth|bawuguth]] || [[word:bawuguj|bawuguj]] || [[word:bawugush|bawugush]] || [[word:bawugu|bawugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bawufguth|bawufguth]] || [[word:bawufguj|bawufguj]] || [[word:bawufgush|bawufgush]] || [[word:bawufguf|bawufguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bawuguthu|bawuguthu]] || [[word:bawuguju|bawuguju]] || [[word:bawugushu|bawugushu]] || [[word:bawuguku|bawuguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bawuguth|bawuguth]] || [[word:bawuguj|bawuguj]] || [[word:bawugush|bawugush]] || [[word:bawugu|bawugu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bawuguthul|bawuguthul]] || [[word:bawugujul|bawugujul]] || [[word:bawugushul|bawugushul]] || [[word:bawugukul|bawugukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bawuguthuthu|bawuguthuthu]] || [[word:bawugujuju|bawugujuju]] || [[word:bawugushushu|bawugushushu]] || [[word:bawuguku|bawuguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bawuguthun|bawuguthun]] || [[word:bawugujun|bawugujun]] || [[word:bawugushun|bawugushun]] || [[word:bawugukun|bawugukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bawuguthuoro|bawuguthuoro]] || [[word:bawugujuoro|bawugujuoro]] || [[word:bawugushuoro|bawugushuoro]] || [[word:bawugukuoro|bawugukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
